content:
# Prinos Basin

**Summary**: A sedimentary basin in the North Aegean Sea containing hydrocarbon deposits.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023]] studied the Epsilon field within the Prinos Basin to develop prediction models.

- [[2023-gad|Gad, 2023]] studied the Prinos Basin to evaluate water saturation prediction.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023]] Dome-like anticline formed by NW-striking and SW-dipping syngenetic faults.

- [[2023-gad|Gad, 2023]] studied the Prinos Basin to evaluate water saturation prediction.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- The Epsilon oil field is located in the north Aegean Sea between the Greek mainland and Thassos. ([[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023, p. 14]])

- The basin contains several fields, including the Epsilon oil field and South Kavala gas field. ([[2023-gad|Gad, 2023, p. 28]])
